query:
-- 为每个活跃的ERP公司创建SYS供应商
INSERT INTO material_suppliers (erpCompanyId, name, code, materialTypeName, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT id, '系统默认供应商', 'SYS', '系统默认', 'active', NOW(), NOW()
FROM erp_companies 
WHERE status = 'active' 
AND id NOT IN (SELECT erpCompanyId FROM material_suppliers WHERE code = 'SYS');

-- 为每个活跃的ERP公司创建COL材料分类
INSERT INTO material_boards (erpCompanyId, supplierId, boardNumber, boardName, materialType, pricePerMeter, currency, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  ec.id,
  ms.id,
  'COL',
  '系统默认材料分类',
  '系统默认',
  0.00,
  'CNY',
  'active',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM erp_companies ec
JOIN material_suppliers ms ON ms.erpCompanyId = ec.id AND ms.code = 'SYS'
WHERE ec.status = 'active'
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM material_boards mb 
  WHERE mb.erpCompanyId = ec.id AND mb.boardNumber = 'COL'
);

-- 为每个活跃的ERP公司创建ORIG颜色
INSERT INTO material_colors (erpCompanyId, boardId, colorCode, colorName, imageUrl, sortOrder, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  ec.id,
  mb.id,
  'ORIG',
  '原色',
  NULL,
  0,
  'active',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM erp_companies ec
JOIN material_suppliers ms ON ms.erpCompanyId = ec.id AND ms.code = 'SYS'
JOIN material_boards mb ON mb.supplierId = ms.id AND mb.boardNumber = 'COL'
WHERE ec.status = 'active'
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM material_colors mc 
  WHERE mc.boardId = mb.id AND mc.colorCode = 'ORIG'
);
